question_text: A radio wave has a frequency of 100 MHz (100,000,000 Hz) and travels at 300,000,000 m/s. Calculate its wavelength.
explanation: Use wavelength = wave speed ÷ frequency. Wavelength = 300,000,000 m/s ÷ 100,000,000 Hz = 3 m. Radio waves have relatively long wavelengths compared to visible light.
